name: cloudcraft-mcp
description: Unofficial Cloudcraft blueprint access through the Model Context Protocol

settings.name: Cloudcraft API key
settings.description: API key from Cloudcraft User settings. It can authorize blueprint reads and writes, so never commit or share it.

settings.name: Cloudcraft API base URL
settings.description: Optional API endpoint override. Keep the default unless using a trusted HTTPS proxy or a loopback test server.

settings.name: Log level
settings.description: Optional stderr log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, or CRITICAL.

settings.name: Enable blueprint writes
settings.description: Set true to permit create and update operations. The default is false.

settings.name: Enable blueprint deletes
settings.description: Set true only with writes enabled to permit exact-ID-confirmed deletes.
